item.title: Notiqflow 0.4.3
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.4.3

This security and privacy update strengthens Notiqflow behind the scenes:

  • Stronger protection for your local data. Saved dictation history, dictionary entries, snippets, preferences, and other private app data now receive additional protection on your Mac.
  • Safer handling of recordings and credentials. Temporary audio and sensitive in-memory data are cleared more promptly, while credentials receive stricter Keychain protection.
  • Safer clipboard and support flows. Sensitive clipboard copies expire automatically, and bug reports use a more tightly controlled delivery path.
  • Verified app resources and updates. Downloaded model files and the release process now have additional integrity and vulnerability checks.

No action is required after installing the update. Existing local data is migrated automatically.
